narrative:
Port Clinton 1A (precinct in Ottawa County) has 932 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
